_README: Image slots for Kök Kalkan. Drop a real photo at public/assets/images/<file> matching the aspect ratio. Until a file exists, SmartImage renders a palette-toned placeholder. Keep alt text descriptive and SEO-friendly. Source photos from Instagram @kokkalkan.tr and Google Maps.

slots.content: Rooftop terrace at golden hour, sea and mountains beyond, tables set.
slots.alt: Kök Kalkan rooftop terrace at sunset overlooking the sea in Kalkan, Antalya
